title: carex arenaria subsp. ligerica
intro: Carex arenaria subsp. ligerica, also known as the dune sedge or seaside sedge, is a subspecies of sedge native to the coastal regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex arenaria subsp. ligerica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy.
